subject: Next Steps: Kickoff meeting setup for CareHealth Onboarding
body:
Hello Hermes Success Team,

I am thrilled to report that our board has fully executed the Master Services Agreement this morning! CareHealth is officially a Hermes AI enterprise partner.

We want to hit the ground running. What are our immediate next steps to coordinate the technical integration kickoff?

Specifically, could you share the developer onboarding documentation and let us know what technical resources (e.g. system access, cloud permissions) our infrastructure team needs to provision prior to our kickoff call?

Looking forward to a great collaboration!

Best,
Nathan Ross
VP of Engineering, CareHealth
